_meta.notes: These are the human-reviewed results from the first previewElite100Matches run. Approved candidates become slab_color_aliases rows. Rejected candidates become slab_color_program_match_reviews rows with review_status=rejected. Do not auto-activate the collection based on this file.

approved_alias_candidates.reason: SlabCloud stores as two words 'Winter Fresh'; catalog uses 'Winterfresh'. Material 'ESF Quartz' is alias for 'ESF'.
British spelling 'Grey' vs American 'Gray'. Same color, same brand.
American spelling 'Gray' vs British 'Grey' in catalog. Material 'ESF Quartz' is alias for 'ESF'.
SlabCloud missing the 'a' in 'Coastal' → 'Costal'. Material 'ESF Quartz' is alias for 'ESF'.
SlabCloud drops the apostrophe: 'Regal D Oro' vs catalog 'Regal D\'Oro'. Same color, same brand.
SlabCloud drops the apostrophe: 'Skys' vs catalog 'Sky\'s'. Material 'ESF Quartz' is alias for 'ESF'.

SlabCloud uses 'Larvik' (ending -k); catalog uses 'Larvic' (ending -c). Chris confirmed these are the same color. Material 'ESF Quartz' is alias for 'ESF'. Note: catalog 'Larvic' has a _review flag — Chris has now confirmed the catalog spelling is 'Larvic'.
SlabCloud drops an 'e': 'Whitendale' vs catalog 'Whitenedale'. Same color, same brand.

rejected_fuzzy_candidates.reason: Fuzzy matched 'Calacatta Athena' to 'Calacatta Lucent' based on shared prefix. These are different colors — 'Athena' is not in the Elite 100. Explicitly rejected to prevent mis-classification.
Fuzzy matched 'Armitage' to 'Hermitage' due to similar character sequence. These are different colors — 'Armitage' is not in the Elite 100. Explicitly rejected to prevent mis-classification.
